basic_details.job_title: NIPER Kolkata Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research
basic_details.post_name: Associate Professor, Assistant Registrar, Receptionist cum Telephone Operator, Junior Technical Assistant
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute of Pharmaceutical Education and Research (NIPER) Kolkata has officially announced the Associate Professor, Assistant Registrar, Receptionist cum Telephone Operator, and Junior Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 4 openings. The detailed notification has been released under Advertisement No. NIPER-K/T-VIII/2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the prescribed age criteria (up to 45 years for Associate Professor, 40 years for Assistant Registrar, 35 years for Receptionist cum Telephone Operator, and 27 years for Junior Technical Assistant) and possess qual

age_limit.age_details: Max age limit for Associate Professor is 45 years. Max age limit for Assistant Registrar is 40 years. Max age limit for Receptionist cum Telephone Operator is 35 years. Max age limit for Junior Technical Assistant is 27 years.
age_limit.details: Associate Professor: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation for OBC(NCL) is 3 years. Assistant Registrar: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Receptionist cum Telephone Operator: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Junior Technical Assistant: Maximum age limit is 27 years.

qualification.details: Associate Professor: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent grade in the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with very good academic record throughout and at least 8 years of Teaching/ Research/ Industrial experience with published works of high quality, well-recognised and established reputation of having made conspicuous seminal contributions to knowledge in Pharmaceutical and allied areas. Assistant Registrar: Master's degree in any discipline from recognized University / Institute. Experience: 8 (Eight) years of relevant experience in a responsible supervisory position of which at least 5 (Five) years in the immediate lower grade pay of Section Officer / Administrative officer (Pay level 8) in Central / State University / Research Institution or Central / State autonomous / other recognized institute of repute. Receptionist cum Telephone Operator: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized University / Institute. Experience: Three (03) years of experience in relevant field in Central/State Govt./ Organizations/ PSUs/University/ Research Institute or Central/State autonomous other recognized institutes of repute. Junior Technical Assistant: Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science Subject.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 13, Pay Level 10, Pay Level 7, Pay Level 4
salary_details.details: Associate Professor: Pay Level 13 (7th CPC) Assistant Registrar: Level-10/7th CPC Receptionist cum Telephone Operator: Level-7/7th CPC Junior Technical Assistant: Level-4/7th CPC

selection_process: Seminar Presentation Interview Written Test Skill Test Performance
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIPER Kolkata Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER Kolkata to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Kolkata Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIPER Kolkata Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIPER Kolkata Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NIPER Kolkata Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Associate Professor: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent grade in the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with very good academic record throughout and at least 8 years of Teaching/ Research/ Industrial experience with published works of high quality, well-recognised and established reputation of having made conspicuous seminal contributions to knowledge in Pharmaceutical and allied areas. Assistant Registrar: Master's degree in any discipline from recognized University / Institute. Experience: 8 (Eight) years of relevant experience in a responsible supervisory position of which at least 5 (Five) years in the immediate lower grade pay of Section Officer / Administrative officer (Pay level 8) in Central / State University / Research Institution or Central / State autonomous / other recognized institute of repute. Receptionist cum Telephone Operator: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized University / Institute. Experience: Three (03) years of experience in relevant field in Central/State Govt./ Organizations/ PSUs/University/ Research Institute or Central/State autonomous other recognized institutes of repute. Junior Technical Assistant: Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science Subject.

content_sections.heading: NIPER Kolkata Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Seminar Presentation Interview Written Test Skill Test Performance

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NIPER Kolkata Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIPER Kolkata to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIPER Kolkata Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for NIPER Kolkata Recruitment 2026 is 17 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIPER Kolkata Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for Associate Professor, Assistant Registrar, Receptionist cum Telephone Operator, and Junior Technical Assistant posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Junior Technical Assistant?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Junior Technical Assistant post is Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science Subject.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Associate Professor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Associate Professor post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for Teaching and Non-Teaching posts (Pay level 10 and above)?
faq.answer: The application fee for Teaching and Non-Teaching posts (Pay level 10 and above) is Rs. 2000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any age relaxations available?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is available for OBC(NCL) candidates for the Associate Professor post, which is 3 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for NIPER Kolkata Recruitment 2026 is online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Assistant Registrar post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Assistant Registrar post is Level-10 as per the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for the application process?
faq.answer: The online application starts on 18 July 2026 and ends on 17 August 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process may include Seminar Presentation, Interview, Written Test, Skill Test, and Performance.
